thoughts.uk: Оманливо легко читається та сповнена корисної інформації для використання ШІ в проектах. Деякі з тем, які розглядаються в книзі: Planning AI application, Training data, Model architecture, Transformer architecture, Models size, calculating training price, post-training, sampling, Structured Outputs, finetuning, evaluation, Language Modeling Metrics, exact vs. subjective evaluation, using AI as a judge, comparative evaluation, Choosing evaluation criteria, Model selection workflow, designing evaluation pipeline, Prompt engineering, Prompt engineering best practices, Defenses against prompt attacks, RAG, Retrieval Algorithms, Chunking, Evaluating retrieval solutions, Multimodal RAG, Agents, Finetuning, PEFT (parameter-efficient finetuning), Finetuning vs. RAG, Model memory in inference and training,
thoughts.en: Deceively easy to read and full of useful information on AI engineering. Some of the topics covered by the book: Planning AI application, Training data, Model architecture, Transformer architecture, Models size, calculating training price, post-training, sampling, Structured Outputs, finetuning, evaluation, Language Modeling Metrics, exact vs. subjective evaluation, using AI as a judge, comparative evaluation, Choosing evaluation criteria, Model selection workflow, designing evaluation pipeline, Prompt engineering, Prompt engineering best practices, Defenses against prompt attacks, RAG, Retrieval Algorithms, Chunking, Evaluating retrieval solutions, Multimodal RAG, Agents, Finetuning, PEFT (parameter-efficient finetuning), Finetuning vs. RAG, Model memory in inference and training,

thoughts.uk: Ця книга є оглядом тем штучного інтелекту з висоти пташиного польоту, і ближче до кінця книги мені починає кортіти прочитати кілька розділів з практичними заняттями.
thoughts.en: This book is a bird-view overview of AI topics and closer to the end of the book I start longing for some hands-on chapters.
